Lemon Squeezy is a payment gateway for e: Lemon Squeezy is a payment gateway for e-commerce and subscription-based businesses.

To get your API Key:

1. Go to your Lemon Squeezy dashboard
2. Navigate to Settings » API
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy the API key and paste it here
Retrieve a paginated list of products fr: Retrieve a paginated list of products from your Lemon Squeezy store.
Retrieve a paginated list of orders from: Retrieve a paginated list of orders from your Lemon Squeezy store, with optional filters.
Retrieve the details of a specific order: Retrieve the details of a specific order by its ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of subscriptio: Retrieve a paginated list of subscriptions from your Lemon Squeezy store.
Create a checkout URL for a specific Lem: Create a checkout URL for a specific Lemon Squeezy product variant.
Retrieve a paginated list of customers f: Retrieve a paginated list of customers from your Lemon Squeezy store.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint

Override the product price in the smalle: Override the product price in the smallest currency unit (e.g. 999 = $9.99). Only works if custom prices are enabled on the variant.
Pre-apply a discount code to the checkou: Pre-apply a discount code to the checkout.
URL to redirect the customer to after a: URL to redirect the customer to after a successful purchase.
ISO 8601 datetime when this checkout URL: ISO 8601 datetime when this checkout URL expires (e.g. 2024-12-31T23:59:59Z). Leave empty for no expiry.
Key-value pairs of custom data to attach: Key-value pairs of custom data to attach to the order (accessible via webhooks).

Filter customers by their email address.

Triggers when a new order is successfull: Triggers when a new order is successfully placed
Triggers when a full or partial refund i: Triggers when a full or partial refund is made on an order
Triggers when a new subscription is succ: Triggers when a new subscription is successfully created
Triggers when a subscription's data is c: Triggers when a subscription's data is changed or updated
Triggers when a subscription is cancelle: Triggers when a subscription is cancelled manually by the customer or store owner
Triggers when a subscription is resumed: Triggers when a subscription is resumed after being previously cancelled
Triggers when a subscription has ended a: Triggers when a subscription has ended after being previously cancelled
Triggers when a subscription's payment c: Triggers when a subscription's payment collection is paused
Triggers when a subscription's payment collection is resumed after being previously paused
Triggers when a subscription payment is: Triggers when a subscription payment is successful
Triggers when a subscription renewal pay: Triggers when a subscription renewal payment fails
Triggers when a subscription has a succe: Triggers when a subscription has a successful payment after a failed payment
Triggers when a subscription payment is: Triggers when a subscription payment is refunded
Triggers when a license key is created f: Triggers when a license key is created from a new order
